features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public marketing pages, hero, header and footer components and copy.

features.name: Auth Modal
features.description: Modal for login / register / change password that calls backend /auth endpoints.

features.name: Routing & ProtectedRoute
features.description: App routing and a `ProtectedRoute` wrapper that guards the dashboard routes.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main authenticated area with header, sidebar and multiple panels (overview, analytics, settings).

features.name: Admin Panel
features.description: Admin-specific pages for users, monitoring and settings.

features.name: Sensors & Telemetry UI
features.description: Components to display sensor cards and analytics charts for telemetry data.

features.name: Settings & Management
features.description: Settings, firm and team management UIs

features.name: API Client
features.description: Axios wrapper that injects auth token into requests and centralizes base URL.

features.name: UI primitives
features.description: Shared design system / primitives used across pages (dialogs, cards, buttons, tables).
